risks.message: High-speed net TMDS_CLK+ has a long route with no visible series or termination resistor
risks.recommendation: Review whether this interface requires termination or series damping based on edge rate and topology.
risks.why_it_matters: Longer high-speed routes can require series damping or termination to control ringing and reflections.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-speed net exceeded the termination review length threshold without a visible resistor component.

fix_suggestion.fix: Review whether this interface requires termination or series damping based on edge rate and topology.

risks.message: Control net INTN has no visible pull resistor component
risks.recommendation: Review whether this control or boot-related net should include an explicit pull-up or pull-down resistor.
risks.why_it_matters: Boot, reset, chip-select, and interrupt nets often need a defined default state to behave reliably.
risks.trigger_condition: A control-sensitive net was identified without a visible pull resistor on the connected component set.
risks.threshold_label: Expected pull resistor presence on control-sensitive nets

fix_suggestion.fix: Review whether this control or boot-related net should include an explicit pull-up or pull-down resistor.

risks.message: U3 (IT6613) has no nearby decoupling capacitor
risks.recommendation: Place a decoupling capacitor close to the device power pin and on the relevant supply net.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearest valid decoupling capacitor exceeded the configured decoupling distance threshold.
risks.observed_label: Observed nearest capacitor distance: none found

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Place a 0.1uF decoupling capacitor close to the IC power pin, ideally within the configured threshold of 4.0.

risks.message: U3 appears to lack enough local decoupling support
risks.recommendation: Add or reposition local bypass capacitors close to the device supply pins with short return paths.
risks.trigger_condition: Component power pins did not have enough nearby local decoupling capacitors within the configured local-support radius.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: Clocking and fast connectivity subsystems share board context and need timing-containment review.
risks.recommendation: Check clock-source placement, reference continuity, and keepout from high-speed connectors.

executive_summary.headline: Board needs focused engineering review
executive_summary.summary: This board shows elevated design risk. The main risk concentration is in power integrity. The highest-priority issue is U15 appears to lack enough local decoupling support. The current design snapshot includes 69 components and 194 nets. The board is likely functional at a prototype level, but the highlighted issues should be addressed before stronger production confidence.
